CPSP259 Practicum: Research (1-3 Credits)

Supervised research project in interest area related to the students’ College Park Scholars program.

Restriction: Must be in the College Park Scholars Program. Repeatable to: 3 credits.

CPSP269 Practicum: Peer Teaching (1-3 Credits)

Supervised peer teaching in students’ College Park Scholars program. Restriction: Must be in the College Park Scholars Program. Repeatable to: 3 credits.
